VIDEO 1

Advertorials

2

with Heath Wilcock





ADVERTORIAL TIME

w/ Heath Wilcock!

Answer These Questions:

What is it?

Why is it?

How does it work?

What makes it different?

How do I get it now?



Depending on Market: advertorials range anywhere between 750 to 1400 words

My Process:

Pain (if that’s true, what else is true?) Agitate (leads to discovery— either a.) they research and find it and detail what

makes it so unique. Or b.) they find out about the product via a neighbor or friend.) Solution (What is it? How does it work?

How fast does it work? What can I expect?





What do others say about it? Where do I get it now?)



The Adverts I Tend To Stick To (The “nightmare story” being the style I write the most)

Nightmare Story Using Demo (example)

Disrupting Company/Business Owner (example)

Review (example)

3rd Person News/Disrupter (Black Hat example and White Hat example)

Listicle (“branded style” that works great for FB here and normal native style ones here)

“Jump Pages” (example)





Headline A:

Is This Weird “[CURIOSITY]” The

Pain-Relieving Miracle Seniors Have Been Searching For?

Subheadline:

One senior shares his heartbreaking story of how this [CURIOSITY] saved his relationship with his grandchildren. Read his story below now.

{{hero image}}



Body:



“Why won’t grandpa come out and play...?”

I’ll never forget hearing those words that came from my 8-year-old grandson...



I could hear him all the way from my room, where I sat alone on the edge of my bed... looking out at the window, wishing I could do something as simple as get up and walk.



[insert image of pain point]



Yet here I am with a swollen knee the size of a cantaloupe... and trying to keep pain pills down, hoping they take effect fast (they never do, what a rip-off).





I used to run around out-front, out on the lawn, tackle my grandchildren and play hide ‘n go seek...



I would even jump on the trampoline with them (yeah... I’m the fun grandpa). My grandkids are the love of my life...

But now I can’t help but feel like a sad, grumpy ol’ codger that lives in the back room and comes out to complain about something to eat...



The truth is— the arthritis in my knees has destroyed the “old me.”



The pain, the swelling that feels like my knees are being boiled in a pot... I’m not the same, lively person I used to be...

The really frustrating part...? I’m not even that old!

I’m 62 years “young”...



However, 40 years of construction finally caught up to me.



Then one day, while golfing 9 holes... I swung a little too wide and POP... I went down like a sack of potatoes.



[insert a split image— image 1: man lying down on the golf course, people coming to his help. Image 2: doctor going over knee x-rays with patient]



Attention: aches and pains making your joints feel like “rock polishers”?

This California start-up company is disrupting Big Pharma with a groundbreaking, non-prescription pain-relieving patch.

Click here to discover how you can live pain-free today »



Doctor told me I shouldn’t play golf anymore... He said I was “lucky” this time...





Then he asked me if I like to paint or draw.



“Perhaps it’s time you find a hobby that doesn’t require you to get up and

move around a lot,” he said.



“What happened to me?” I remember thinking. “Everything seemed to be fine not too long ago... how did my age go downhill so darn fast?”

If you feel this way and suffer with any form of inflammation... or if your joint aches and pains keep you up at night, unable to sleep, then pay close attention to this next part...



Because I’m going to reveal how I discovered the best— and unexpected— pain-relieving solution that has helped me live a happier, healthier life free of aches and pains.



...and this actually works in minutes and in the comfort of your own home. Trust me... I didn’t think it was possible, either.

Now, I made some big (and costly) mistakes along the way. That’s why I’m sharing this with you now...

I want you to avoid the suffering I had to put up with... the time wasted on nonsense drugs and “snake oil” remedies... and lame-duck doctors that just toss whatever’s on their desk at you...



Listen— I’ve tried everything in the book to get rid of aches and pains, including...



× Icing muscles at night

× Switching back and forth between cold and warm compress

× Taking natural supplements like turmeric (expensive and still in pain)





× Popping harmful pain medications from doctors (or even NSAIDs from the grocery store)



But nothing worked...



Some days, the pain was so bad, it was almost impossible for me to get out of bed...



[insert image]



The Bizarre and Unlikely “Patch” That Zapped My Knee Pain Away In Minutes

One day while researching online for hours... searching for anything to help

with my inflamed knee...



That’s when I came across [company name + big reveal]



At first, I was skeptical because I heard about the main ingredient and I

wasn’t sure if it would get me “high” or not...



I quickly found out there was zero THC in this patch (i.e., the stuff that gets

you “high”).



And the best part was... I didn’t have to taste the nasty CBD.



I heard about the bitter taste of those CBD drops... and how many people

found the health benefits weren’t worth enduring the taste.



(I grew up drinking cod liver oil. I’ve done my fair share of suffering...)



So I never bothered testing out this CBD... I thought it was all hype and no substance.



I remember thinking there was no way it could be “that” powerful.



Well— that’s the part that REALLY surprised me...(and I’ll get to my results in just a sec).









[insert image of someone putting the patch on their knee or another joint]

Text underneath image: [name brand and product] goes directly on the inflamed area for instant relief without waiting for hours to digest gross-tasting cannabinol oil



As you can probably tell from my story, I had nothing left to lose... I was willing to try anything to relieve the constant throbbing...

And if you’re reading this right now, then you know what I’m talking about...



I wanted to run around again with my grandkids and not be seen as the ol’ curmudgeon that yells from down the hall...



I wanted to dance with my wife in the kitchen, surprise her when she least expects it, make her laugh and see her smile...



I wanted to go to church again, to be able to sit in the pew... and then be able to get up without crying out in pain.



So I took a leap of faith and ordered my first pack of [brand name and product] Within 7 speedy business days, my package arrived...

[insert image of the patches]



Putting The Patches To The Test (Oh Boy Was I Surprised)

I tore open the first patch and applied it to my aching knee.



The backing layer that sticks to your skin is made with what’s called “hydrogel.”



This unique substance allows you to stick the nano patch wherever on your body and it won’t slide around... or leave a gross residue... or pull your hair.



Each patch is good for 72 hours, making each patch 100% re-usable without losing its “stickiness.”





What I noticed right away was this instant “cooling effect.”



[insert image. Let’s make it “science-y.” Show how it works on the skin. Show pain-relief “cooling lines” destroying inflammation. Show something like this: https://d.pr/i/U2BMYI it doesn’t need to be super in-depth and complicated. It’s more about the “feel” of credibility that’s important]



Then within 2 minutes, I noticed the usual “throbbing” had started to die down.



Then 10 minutes later, it felt as though the swelling was beginning to deflate...



Then 20 minutes later, I could stand up and put pressure on my knee and only feel a “slight” pinch (which is a MASSIVE improvement from where I started).



Then came the big test— can I walk out to the living room?



Sure enough... I went strolling out to the living room, with almost zero shooting pains, and only a slight limp.



I wasn’t expecting it to be a miracle, but I must say I was impressed by the power of these little patches...



It was the first time that I actually understood the saying “age is just a number.”



This next part surprised me, too...



30 minutes after I went out to the living room and raved to my wife about the [name brand + product name] my son and his family showed up.



[insert image— positive vibes. Future pacing. Happy moments.] “Grandpa!” my grandson said when he saw me from the doorway.

He dropped his coat and ran up to me... and I actually squatted down to give him a hug.



I couldn’t believe it myself.





Thanks to [name brand + name of product], I feel like I’m getting a “second wind” in life.
